description:
You are working as a web-developer who has just been asked to flip the project from “development” to “production” mode.  
Two existing configuration files must be updated and a very small audit log must be produced.

1. Files that already exist  
   a. /home/user/project/config/site_config.yaml  
   b. /home/user/project/config/database.toml  

2. Goal – after you finish, the files must look EXACTLY like this:

––––– /home/user/project/config/site_config.yaml –––––
site_name: "My Portfolio"
production: true
assets:
  js_minify: false
  css_minify: true
––––– end of file –––––

––––– /home/user/project/config/database.toml –––––
[database]
host = "localhost"
port = 5432
user = "admin"
password = "admin"
pool_size = 15
––––– end of file –––––

3. Required audit log  
Create the directory /home/user/update_logs (if it does not already exist) and inside it create the text file /home/user/update_logs/config_update.log that contains EXACTLY the three lines below (no trailing or leading spaces, no blank lines).  
The test-suite will compare this file byte-for-byte.

Line 1: UPDATED site_config.yaml production=true  
Line 2: UPDATED site_config.yaml assets.css_minify=true  
Line 3: UPDATED database.toml database.pool_size=15  

4. Constraints  
• You do not have root; stay in /home/user.  
• Only one terminal command is needed to make each change, but you may use as many commands as you want.  
• Do not change anything else in either file—only what is shown above.  

When you are done, the YAML, the TOML, and the log file must match the exact formatting shown here so the automated tests can verify your work.

  css_minify: false

2. /home/user/project/config/database.toml

port = 5432
user = "admin"
password = "admin"
pool_size = 5

3. /home/user/update_logs/  (directory) does NOT exist yet.

Expected state after successful completion:

production: true

  css_minify: true

2. /home/user/project/config/database.toml

port = 5432

pool_size = 15

3. /home/user/update_logs/config_update.log

UPDATED site_config.yaml assets.css_minify=true
UPDATED database.toml database.pool_size=15
